current_blockers.name: vllm_fp8_swa_quant_insert_proxy
current_blockers.reason: The standalone Triton quantize_and_insert_k_cache proxy compiles tl.float8e4nv and fails on sm80. vLLM engine uses fused_deepseek_v4_qnorm_rope_kv_rope_quant_insert / compressor custom ops instead, so this proxy is not the real engine path.

current_blockers.name: vllm_sparse_attn_indexer_full_logits_topk
current_blockers.reason: Full SparseAttnIndexer decode requires vLLM attention metadata, kv-cache manager, FP8 indexer cache pages, and custom-op registration state.

current_blockers.name: vllm_deepseek_v4_attention_custom_op_full
current_blockers.reason: torch.ops.vllm.deepseek_v4_attention mutates engine-owned output/cache buffers and depends on active forward context.

current_blockers.name: vllm_cudagraph_dispatcher_runtime
current_blockers.reason: CUDA graph replay requires GPUModelRunner, CudagraphDispatcher descriptors, persistent input buffers, and attention backend builders.

derived_observations.observation: mini sparse attention direct bf16 cache is 0.5777 ms while vLLM fp8-cache gather/dequant plus split-K decode is 0.2258 ms for T=4/history=4096.
derived_observations.caveat: Layouts differ: mini reads bf16 flat cache directly; vLLM reads packed fp8_ds_mla cache then materializes bf16 gathered KV.

derived_observations.observation: vLLM split-K core alone is 0.1320 ms; using it alone as the comparison would overstate the gap because gather/dequant adds 0.1129 ms.
mini indexer_select_bf16 is 0.3394 ms; vLLM fused indexer Q RoPE/quant is 0.0871 ms but is not the full vLLM SparseAttnIndexer logits/topk boundary.
derived_observations.caveat: Full vLLM indexer logits/topk is engine-bound and precision-changing through FP8 indexer cache.

derived_observations.observation: mini compressed/indexer cache store probe is 0.9762 ms, consistent with the post-Marlin Nsight indexer/cache bucket of about 0.969 s over the 4096/128 rank0 window.
derived_observations.caveat: The directly comparable vLLM cache insert is a C++/custom-op engine path over packed fp8 cache, not a standalone exact bf16 path.

derived_observations.observation: vLLM compute_global_topk_indices_and_lens is 0.0566 ms for T=4/topk512 and represents a concrete metadata-consolidation design mini can adapt without adopting FP8 cache precision.

target07_subgraph_parity.boundary_warning: Prior vLLM sparse numbers are core-only and exclude gather/dequant.

interpretation.why_not_direct_port: The vLLM advantage is bound to fp8_ds_mla KV cache and FP8 indexer cache layout plus engine custom ops; direct port would change mini's exact bf16 cache policy.
interpretation.why_not_local_polish_first: The paired evidence shows boundary/layout/metadata differences, not just a single slow local kernel.
interpretation.recommended_next_work: Write a narrow exact-path target to adapt vLLM's decode boundary ideas: global-topk/lens consolidation, bf16 two-scope gather/mask or split-K sparse decode, and graph-stable metadata buffers. Keep FP8 cache/indexer as a separate opt-in precision/cache lane.
